title: frontend
author: sevilbk-trimble

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

This PR updates the LookupList frontend module exports so the Discipline lookup list can route igGrid checkbox changes through the shared `LookupListModule.CheckboxChanged` handler (consistent with the existing UOM module pattern).

**Changes:**
- Added `LookupListModule_Discipline.IgGrid_CheckboxChanged` export as a proxy to `m_Module.CheckboxChanged`.
- Standardized checkbox-change handling for Discipline to match other lookup list modules that support checkbox columns.
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]
